summary: Iteration 3 verification of NOWREALM Phase 3 (brand/pricing/testimonials/DM/drop-comments/welcome-book/ad-copy/notif-prefs/upload/profile/cancel-funnel/admin-tabs). Backend: 86/86 pytest pass after 2 in-place fixes (DM threads coroutine bug + ProfileIn cover_position_y field + projection). Frontend smoke: ALL targeted data-testids present (pricing has 2 cards no foundational, stewardship cancel-funnel works, profile uploads + cover-drag-area, admin has Brand/Pricing/Testimonials/Ad Copy/Steward of Stewards/Notifications tabs, /testimonials + /dm render).

minor.issue: FIXED IN-PLACE BY TESTER. server.py:1843 used `async for t in db.dm_threads.find(...).to_list(200):` which is invalid — .to_list() returns an awaitable, not an async iterable. Caused 500 on every DM thread list call. Patched to `rows = await ... .to_list(200); for t in rows:`.

FIXED IN-PLACE BY TESTER. ProfileIn pydantic model was missing `cover_position_y` (so the field was silently dropped before reaching DB) AND /users/{id}/public projection didn't return it. Also removed leftover `pronouns: Optional[str]` from ProfileIn per spec. Added cover_position_y to both ProfileIn (models.py:172) and the public projection (server.py:1428). Re-tested — value 42 now persists and is returned.

Existing seeded checklist item #5 in DB still contains legacy copy: 'Upload a profile picture, cover image, bio and pronouns in Admin > Profile.' The seed.py source is clean, but the seed routine is not updating already-inserted documents. Either delete/reseed the checklist collection, or change seed to upsert the description field.

action_items: REVIEW tester's 2 minor backend patches: (a) server.py dm_threads async iteration fix; (b) models.py ProfileIn — added cover_position_y, removed pronouns; (c) server.py /users/{id}/public projection — replaced 'pronouns' with 'cover_position_y'. Also removed `pronouns` from backend_test.py TestProfile payload so the existing iteration_2 test passes under the new contract.
MIGRATE/RESEED the admin checklist to drop the word 'pronouns' from item #5 description (DB row still has old text — visible on /admin Launch Wizard screenshot).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1952 lines. Strongly recommend splitting into routers/{brand,pricing,testimonials,dm,uploads,ad_copy,welcome_book}.py — this iteration alone added ~400 lines of route code in a single file.
DM endpoints don't validate body length or rate-limit. A malicious member could flood dm_messages. Add a max body length (e.g. 4 KB) and per-user per-minute throttle.

/upload/image trusts user-declared MIME from the data-URL prefix and only enforces a 6MB cap. It does NOT sniff content magic bytes — an attacker could upload arbitrary binary labelled as image/png. Consider Pillow.Image.open() round-trip validation.

DM `dm_thread` GET marks recipient-side as read but never verifies the requester is one of the participants — currently safe because thread_key is derived from BOTH ids, but a malicious user could still call with any user_id and silently mark unrelated threads (none of theirs) as read. Add an explicit assertion `if user['id'] not in {a,b}`.

Public testimonials endpoint returns up to 50 rows with .sort([('status', -1), ('created_at', -1)]) — string sort puts 'pending' BEFORE 'featured'/'approved' in some Mongo versions; rely on the $in filter (it works here), but consider explicit ordering with $cond.
DEFAULT_PREFS in server.py:1868 is defined inline; consider moving to models.py so frontend can import the same defaults via a /constants endpoint.
Iter2 minor still applies: POST /admin/trigger-drops doesn't also call scheduler._publish_due_articles (out of scope this iteration, just a reminder).
/admin/win-to-testimonial doesn't verify the source post has kind=='win' — admin can convert ANY post (drop_comment, regular, etc.) into a testimonial. Add guard `if p.get('kind') != 'win': 400`.
test_credentials: Admin: robinangel700@gmail.com / BoopLoop777. Test members use @example.com (pydantic EmailStr rejects .test).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed users, drops, articles, testimonials, posts, dms. Most TEST_ data persists for re-runs; article tests teardown their own data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite is now split into /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (61 iter1+iter2 cases) and /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py (25 iter3 cases). Run both: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Iter3 fixes: ProfileIn no longer accepts 'pronouns' (will be silently dropped by pydantic), and /users/{id}/public exposes 'cover_position_y' instead. /api/dm/threads now uses await-then-iterate pattern. Frontend smoke verified: brand CSS vars are applied via /public/brand (BrandLoader in App.js), cancel-funnel modal opens via data-testid='cancel-funnel'.
rca of the issue: Two coding bugs RCA: (1) GET /dm/threads — author used `async for x in cursor.to_list(n)` which is the wrong API; Motor's cursor returns an async iterator without .to_list, OR you call `await cursor.to_list(n)` and iterate the resulting list. Symptom: 500 with TypeError 'async for requires __aiter__'. Reproduction: send a DM then GET /dm/threads. Fix applied: `rows = await ... .to_list(200); for t in rows:`. (2) cover_position_y wasn't persisting — pydantic's ProfileIn schema dropped any unknown field, so the PATCH body's cover_position_y never reached `model_dump(exclude_unset=True)`. Plus the public projection didn't include it. Reproduction: PATCH /me/profile with cover_position_y=42 then GET /users/{id}/public — returned no such key. Fix: add field to model + add key to projection. Side effect: removed lingering pronouns from model + projection per Phase-3 spec.
